positive: A stylized, whimsical forest gathering scene, featuring silhouetted figures of diverse people enjoying nature. The central elements include glowing bioluminescent flora, stylized mushroom clusters, and floating geometric lanterns. The overall composition is balanced and circular, framed by exaggerated, lush foliage, allowing for excellent negative space contrast. Color palette is deep indigo, emerald green, and neon turquoise accents. The style is highly detailed vector art mixed with deep fantasy illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast, clean lines, and graphic impact. Central composition, full coverage.
